issues.description: Condition should check if Leader IS Imu, not if a card named Imu is on board. Use LeaderIsName with value 'Imu', not HasCardOnBoard.
Missing mandatory rest action for DON!! card. Text states 'rest 1 of your DON!! cards' which must precede trash action.

SearchDeck action is incorrect. Should use PlayFromHand or similar to play from trash. SearchDeck retrieves from deck, not trash. Must filter for {Five Elders} type, 5000 power, and limit to 5 different card names from trash.
Action sequence is wrong: should be (1) Rest DON, (2) Trash from hand, (3) KO characters, (4) Play up to 5 Five Elders from trash. Current sequence doesn't reflect the cost/effect structure properly.
